title: Addition
summary: Addition describes the combination of quantities into a total.
claim: Addition combines quantities into a larger quantity while preserving consistent quantity relationships.

proof_layers.summary: Addition describes the combination of quantities into a total.
proof_layers.intuitive_explanation: Combining two counted collections and recounting gives a total represented as a + b.
proof_layers.formal_or_structural_proof: Combining two counted collections and recounting gives a total represented as a + b.
proof_layers.empirical_or_reconstruction_basis: Reconstructable with simple objects, marks, measurement, or geometric construction depending on the truth.
proof_layers.validation_assessment: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic.
